summary: Ran backend + frontend regression for iteration_8 owner-auth fix and P0 dashboards. Backend regression passed fully (8/8). Owner auth guard works on protected APIs, owner login returns signed non-static bearer token, and authenticated owner dashboard tabs load. Public booking API flow works via backend tests; UI public flow reached date/time step but Playwright could not reliably click calendar day due missing stable day-level test selectors.

ui_bugs.issue: No stable day-level data-testid on date cells; automation could not reliably select day to complete end-to-end public booking flow in UI run.

action_items: Add explicit data-testid for day cells in shadcn calendar to make booking E2E deterministic (e.g., date-day-YYYY-MM-DD).
After adding day selectors, re-run full public booking UI confirmation path end-to-end.
Optional security hardening: CORS is configured with allow_credentials=true and CORS_ORIGINS='*'; use explicit origins for credentialed auth flows.
critical_code_review_comments: Owner route protection is correctly enforced using require_owner dependency on tested endpoints.
Owner token is signed JWT-like (non-static), fixing prior bypass risk from iteration_8.
Auth playbook file /app/auth_testing.md is missing, so optional playbook checks (bcrypt/cookies/lockout/seed_admin) could not be executed.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_OWNER_* bookings via API during pytest regression to validate owner daily/no-show/insights/stylist no-show flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression is green (8/8). Owner auth fix verified for unauth 401 + auth 200 behavior. Frontend owner login and tabs validated. Remaining gap is deterministic public booking UI automation due calendar day selector stability.
rca of the issue: UI automation failure RCA: booking calendar day cells do not expose stable test ids, and role/name date targeting is flaky under dynamic month state. This blocks deterministic E2E selection of date in Playwright despite page rendering correctly. Mitigation: expose date-specific data-testid attributes and prefer those selectors in UI tests.
